CVE-2026-48829.title: In GNU SASL before 2.2.3, DIGEST-MD5 has a NULL pointer dereferen ...
CVE-2026-48829.description: In GNU SASL before 2.2.3, DIGEST-MD5 has a NULL pointer dereference affecting both clients and servers, via a known token with no accompanying = character. This occurs in lib/digest-md5/getsubopt.c.

CVE-2026-56968.title: GNU SASL before 2.2.4 lacks sanitization of a short challenge in  ...
CVE-2026-56968.description: GNU SASL before 2.2.4 lacks sanitization of a short challenge in _gsasl_ntlm_client_step in the NTLM client, which could result in memory disclosure via a crafted server.
